extension.description: A vibrant, futuristic dark theme with neon accents for modern developers.
command.enableNeonDreams.title: Enable Neon Dreams
command.disableNeonDreams.title: Disable Neon Dreams
command.toggleNeonDreams.title: Toggle Neon Dreams
command.enableReactorGlow.title: Enable Reactor Glow
command.disableReactorGlow.title: Disable Reactor Glow
command.toggleReactorGlow.title: Toggle Reactor Glow
config.brightness.description: Set the brightness of the Neon Dreams glow effect (0.0 fully transparent, 1.0 fully bright).
config.glow.description: Enable the glow text-shadow effect. When disabled, only editor chrome updates are applied.
config.showNotifications.description: Show informational notifications when Neon Dreams changes state.
config.reactor.enabled.description: Enable Reactor Glow, which makes the Neomono UI react to diagnostics and debugging in the active file.
config.reactor.intensity.description: Control how strong Reactor Glow color shifts should feel.
config.reactor.affectStatusBar.descripti: Let Reactor Glow recolor the status bar.
config.reactor.affectActivityBar.descrip: Let Reactor Glow recolor the activity bar background and border.
config.reactor.affectTitleBar.descriptio: Let Reactor Glow tint the active title bar.
config.reactor.affectPanelTitle.descript: Let Reactor Glow recolor the active panel title border.
config.reactor.affectEditorDiagnostics.d: Let Reactor Glow intensify editor error and warning colors.
config.reactor.affectEditorBackground.de: Let Reactor Glow add a subtle state-based tint to the editor background.
config.reactor.affectTabBorder.descripti: Let Reactor Glow recolor the active tab border.
